subcodes.title: Kitab al-Vahid 11 (Tablet to the eleventh Letter of the Living)
subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who hath created the heavens and the earth by His command, and verily they that believe in God and His signs, these shall dwell in paradise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله القائم القدوس. الحمد لله الذی قد خلق السموات و الارض بامره و ان الذین هم یؤمنون بالله و آیاته اولئک هم فی الرضوان
subcodes.subjects: @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
